title: Free-Standing Toilet Roll Holder, Stainless Steel, Silver, Holds 5 Rolls
features: Material：The toilet roll holder is made of premium stainless steel, with shiny surface and weighted base, waterproof & rustproof, suitable for humid environments such as bathroom and kitchen;
Dimensions (W x D x H)：6.69×6.69×22.25,Standard size toilet roll holder stand;
Steady Freestanding: Toilet roll holder free standing with weighted base for stability, place the toilet roll stand holder alone anywhere without tipping it over;

Folding Design: Paper towel rolls holder can save space, set down next to the toilet for stylish yet discreet storage, L-shaped arm holds a single roll, vertical pole-style reserve space for up to 4 toilet rolls;

Easy Installation: No drilling needed! Just connect the toilet roll holder stand to the heavy-duty base. Easy to be moved anywhere. The classic design makes this loo roll dispenser fits perfectly into every bathroom.
description: Product Description This free-standing toilet roll holder can save space, set down next to the toilet for stylish yet discreet storage. Toilet roll holder free standing can hold up to 5 toilet rolls, keep you bathroom tidy and organized. Easy Installation No drilling needed! Easy to be moved anywhere! Please follow detailed instructions step-by-step , it can help you organize better! Freestanding Toilet Roll Holder The toilet roll holder is made of premium stainless steel, waterproof & rustproof, suitable for humid environments such as bathroom and kitchen. Easy to Clean Shiny surface, simple wipe to ensure smoothness, hassle-free maintenance. Unique Design The unique design of the top of the L-shaped arm can prevent the paper roll from slipping off.
